raw_title: Book Review: ‘Where the Music Had to Go,’ by Jim Windolf
book_title: ‘Where the Music Had to Go,’ by Jim Windolf
description: Jim Windolf’s new book, “Where the Music Had to Go,” traces the influence of Dylan on the Beatles and the Beatles on Dylan.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘On the Calculation of Volume IV,’ by Solvej Balle
book_title: ‘On the Calculation of Volume IV,’ by Solvej Balle
description: Solvej Balle’s cult hit series about a woman trapped in a time loop continues with a fourth volume.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘RFK Jr.,’ by Isabel Vincent
description: In “RFK Jr.: The Fall and Rise,” a New York Post reporter paints an intimate portrait of the Kennedy scion and cabinet member.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘Korean Messiah,’ by Jonathan Cheng
description: A new history by Jonathan Cheng argues that an influx of missionaries in the late 19th century profoundly shaped the ruling Kim family dynasty.
